calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-20-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:50AM
JUDGE PRO TEM JASON JUNGREIS, CLERK WESLEY RAMIREZ, NOTHING ON RECORD, DEPT 525.
CAUSE CALLED FOR SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL. APPELLANT, EILYN DATAYLO APPEARS IN PRO PER. RESPONDENT, VILLA JACINTO APPEARS IN PRO PER. PARTIES, PREVIOUSLY SWORN, TESTIFY IN THE NARRATIVE AND RESPOND TO QUESTIONS FROM JUDGE JUNGREIS.

JUDGE JUNGREIS ACKNOWLEDGES THAT CASES CSM-13-845543 AND CSM-13-845545 ARE RELATED AND REFERENCE THE SAME PROPERTY AND MATTER, AND THEREFORE WITH NO OBJECTIONS FROM THE PARTIES, PROCEEDS TO HEAR THE AFOREMENTIONED CASES TOGETHER.
